colors.instructions_to_main_agent: Replace all instances of industrial safety-orange (#FF4500) and brutalist carbon-black theme with this refined black and gold palette. Update CSS variables in index.css: --carbon becomes #0A0A0A, --orange becomes #C9A24B. The primary hero, header, and footer should have a deep BLACK background (#0A0A0A). The product catalog and detail sections should use CREAM/WHITE (#FBFBF9) backgrounds to ensure high visibility of products, using restrained gold and black text for accents.

guidelines.body: text-base leading-relaxed font-body text-gray-300 (dark mode) or text-gray-800 (light mode)

typography.instructions_to_main_agent: Remove Cabinet Grotesk and IBM Plex Sans from index.css. Add Google Fonts imports for 'Cormorant Garamond' (weights 300,400,500,600) and 'Outfit' (weights 300,400,500). Update font utility classes to reflect these luxury choices. Use generous line heights for body text and tight letter spacing for large headers.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style or wide asynchronous grids. For product catalog: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-8
layout_and_spacing.dividers: Use ultra-thin gold or silver hairline dividers: border-b border-[#C9A24B]/30

components.navbar: Sticky z-50. Deep black background (bg-[#0A0A0A]/90) with backdrop-blur-xl. Gold accents on hover. Use the provided logo carefully cropped.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A24B] text-white hover:bg-[#E6C878] transition-all duration-300 font-body tracking-wider uppercase text-sm rounded-none border border-transparent shadow-lg
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-[#C9A24B] border border-[#C9A24B] hover:bg-[#C9A24B]/10 transition-all duration-300 font-body tracking-wider uppercase text-sm rounded-none

cards.dark: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#C9A24B]/20 rounded-none shadow-none hover:border-[#C9A24B]/60 transition-all duration-500
cards.light: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-none shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#C9A24B]/40 transition-all duration-500

components.instructions_to_main_agent: Strip out brutalist hard shadows (e.g., 6px 6px 0 0 #FF4500). Replace them with soft ambient shadows or elegant hairline borders. Ensure all Shadcn components (buttons, inputs) are updated to rounded-none for a sharp, high-end architectural look, matching the premium vibe.

effects.hover: Subtle border color shifts or gentle lifts. No bouncy or fast animations.

motion.instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Framer Motion for scroll reveals. Keep the stagger effects on product catalog lists slow and purposeful. Add pulse effects only to the WhatsApp CTA but make it a soft gold/green glow instead of jarring.

logos.guidance: Since the navbar is dark, this black-background logo asset can be blended beautifully if placed correctly. Use CSS mix-blend-mode or ensure the navbar background strictly matches the #0A0A0A in the logo to make it look seamless.

media.image_treatment: Images should have minimal overlays unless text needs contrast. If text overlay is necessary, use a subtle linear gradient to black (max 50% opacity). Never use pure flat black overlays that obscure the premium visuals.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='product-card-1').
